form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.25) when fifth over 390m at this track in a Free For All. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from six starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at this track. Hard to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Comes off a (21.82) win last time, scoring by 1.75 lengths in a Free For All over 390m at this track. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 3rd over 457m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (26.00) behind Zephyr in a Mix 5 on March 28. In form and another win would not surprise.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.17) at this track in a Free For All, finishing third and beaten 5 lengths. Has three wins and five placings from 14 starts from the draw. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 2nd in a Free For All on April 10 over 390m at this track behind Cake Is Great beaten 1.75 lengths (21.94). Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Sure to go well.
